applied_suggestions.summary: Completed Strigolactone Perception Gate (Motif 1): Strigolactone -> D14 -> MAX2 -> BZR_BES(-1). Strigolactone -> Plant_Height direct edge REMOVED.
edges_removed: Strigolactone -> Plant_Height (+1) - replaced by the gate through BZR_BES
applied_suggestions.notes: Motif 1 purity now achieved: Strigolactone has ONLY ONE outgoing edge (to D14). MAX2 gets an on-cascade output via MAX2->BZR_BES(-1) using E127 (MAX2->BES1 curated evidence applied to the BZR_BES composite). SMXL6_7_8 NOT added because it has no curated downstream reaching Plant_Height - adding it would leave a floating or fabricated edge. Net SL effect on height now runs via MAX2->BZR_BES(-1): SL high -> MAX2 active -> BZR_BES phosphorylated/degraded -> reduced BR-driven growth. This matches the MAX2-BES1 molecular mechanism (Wang 2013). Side effect: Plant_Height activators drop from 5 to 4 (PIF4_5_7, BZR_BES, ARF6_7_8, ARR1), staying within the 3-5 phenotype activator target.

applied_suggestions.summary: Added CO photoperiod robustness regulators: ZTL(-1), CDF1(-1), PHYA(+1), FKF1-|CDF1.
applied_suggestions.notes: CO now has 5 inputs: 2 activators (FKF1, PHYA) + 3 inhibitors (PHYB, ZTL, CDF1) = full photoperiod model. FKF1 gains a second output (CDF1 degradation) matching its canonical function. phyA renamed PHYA for GENE regex compliance.

applied_suggestions.summary: Added Trap-5 framework disclosure to the 5 gate-bypass edges: Gibberellin->GA20OX/GA3OX/GA2OX, Auxin->IPT, ABA->GA20OX.
edges_modified: Gibberellin -> GA20OX (-1): mechanism appended with Trap-5 note
Gibberellin -> GA3OX (-1): mechanism appended with Trap-5 note
Gibberellin -> GA2OX (+1): mechanism appended with Trap-5 note
Auxin -> IPT (-1): mechanism appended with Trap-5 note
ABA -> GA20OX (-1): mechanism appended with Trap-5 note
applied_suggestions.notes: Applied as post-processing inside build_network.py. Each mechanism field now ends with: '[Framework note: this edge bypasses a receptor Perception Gate (Motif 1). Biologically the feedback runs through DELLA/ARF/ABI5 but those intermediate edges are absent from curated_edges.json. Exogenous-hormone in receptor-KO backgrounds will still modulate this target - a known Trap-5 framework limitation.]'

applied_suggestions.summary: Added COOLAIR lncRNA and LDL1 histone demethylase as additional FLC repressors.
applied_suggestions.notes: lncCOOLAIR named with lowercase 'lnc' prefix to satisfy REGULATORY_RNA regex ^[a-z]+[0-9A-Z]. LDL1 added as separate GENE (not folded into AUT_SYN) to preserve single-gene resolution for ldl1 mutants. FLC now has 6 inputs: 1 activator (FRI) + 5 inhibitors (VIN3, AUT_SYN, PRC2, lncCOOLAIR, LDL1) - at the cap but valid.

deferred_suggestions.reason: SMXL6_7_8 -> Plant_Height direct edge for height context not in curated. Literature_gap only.

BP/STM meristem branch - adding would push Plant_Height activators from 4 to 5 which is at cap but marginal; low biological priority for height vs meristem identity. Defer to post-validation refinement if needed.

Early GA biosynthesis (CPS/KS/KO/KAO composite) - low priority; current GA20OX+GA3OX composite covers the terminal regulated steps. Add only if ga1/ga2/ga3 mutant resolution becomes necessary post-validation.

phenotype_input_summary.note: Strigolactone removed as direct activator after S101 Perception Gate completion. All canonical growth effector classes still represented via the TF integrators.

qa_results.validate_schema: PASS (all 4 BUILDER outputs valid against Pydantic schemas)

next_step: JUDGE iteration 3 (final review; must verdict approved or stop_max_iterations).
